svg.title: Afu faithful Rive import source
svg.desc: Afu rebuilt from the original SVG paths with semantic layer names for Rive rigging.

path.data-rive-note: Original transparent compound silhouette from Afu.svg. Keep hidden; useful for bounds checking.
Original fill path. Keep shape exact; animate as part of right-inner foot group.
Original fill path. Keep shape exact; animate as part of left-inner foot group.
Original fill path. Keep shape exact; animate as part of right-outer foot group.
Original fill path. Keep shape exact; animate as part of left-outer foot group.
Original main body fill compound path. This path carries the real Afu silhouette and internal cut geometry.
Original outline compound path. This is the silhouette lock for Afu and should remain visually unchanged.
Original right dark oval eye. Preserve scale and placement.
Original left dark oval eye. Preserve the slight asymmetry.
Original right inner ear compound contour.
Original left inner ear compound contour.
Original right inner ear fill detail.
Original left inner ear fill detail.
